en.name: .50 AE Anti Armored Asset
en.description: An ultra specialized .50 AE cartridge designed to provide neutralization capabilities against light armored vehicles from small arms equipped units. This loading was originally meant to be able to disable vehicles via engine block damage through armored plates utilizing a ultra-pressure powder amount and a special penetrator tip. However, this round was not originally designed as an anti-personnel cartridge but rather a unique utility. This can be seen in the rather unwieldy recoil, high wear, and rarity. Nonetheless, the velocity and penetration capabilities of a cartridge this size are considered second to none.
